name: Apple Pear Pie
recipeIngredient: 5 large Apples, Cortland (or other baking apple)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In a separate bowl, mix 1 cup Flour, 1 cup Brown Sugar, 8 tablespoons Butter, and 1 cup Chopped Nuts for the topping.
3. Pour the apple and pear filling into an unbaked pie shell.
4. Sprinkle the topping mixture over the filling.
5. Bake at 350 degrees F for 45 minutes or until apples are soft.
6. Allow to cool to room temperature before serving. Best served refrigerated, especially if made ahead of time.
(Note: This recipe is a family favorite that has been passed down for decades.)
